=== RUN   Test_SimpleTestSuite
=== RUN   Test_SimpleTestSuite/TestSucceeds
=== RUN   Test_SimpleTestSuite/TestFails
    suite_test.go:34: assertion failed: got: "+ 1 line\n+ 1 line\n"
--- FAIL: Test_SimpleTestSuite (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- PASS: Test_SimpleTestSuite/TestSucceeds (<TIMESTAMP>)
    --- FAIL: Test_SimpleTestSuite/TestFails (<TIMESTAMP>)
FAIL
FAIL	github.com/mvrahden/go-test/examples/simple_suite	<TIMESTAMP>
FAIL

exit status 1
